scenarios.name: private requests are visible only to the submitter (committee aside); public ones to everyone

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_architectural_review__requests (id, title, status, submitted_by, visibility, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending', ?, 'private', ?, ?)
